ddls:
CREATE TABLE "browsers" (
  "browser_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each browser */,
  "browser_name" TEXT /* Name of the browser (e.g., GoogleChrome, MicrosoftEdge) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the browser */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the browser version */,
  "engine" TEXT /* Rendering engine used by the browser (e.g., Blink, Gecko) */,
  "os_compatibility" TEXT /* Operating systems supported by the browser (e.g., Windows, macOS, Linux) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("browser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language (e.g., JS, WASM) */,
  "paradigm" TEXT /* Programming paradigm (e.g., object-oriented, functional) */,
  "typing_discipline" TEXT /* Typing discipline (e.g., statically-typed, dynamically-typed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the package */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark result */,
  "browser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the browser used for the test */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language used for the test */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package used for the test */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage during the test */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage during the test */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Execution time of the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the test was conducted (e.g., desktop, mobile, cloud) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_results_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_results_browser_id FOREIGN KEY ("browser_id") REFERENCES browsers ("browser_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_results_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, researcher, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the result */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark result */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the result was uploaded */,
  "upload_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes provided by the user for the upload */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uploads_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES benchmark_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Short description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Short description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Name of the browser (e.g., GoogleChrome, MicrosoftEdge)
